violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Observed open bags of food in prep freezer.--Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -Observed box of food on floor of Walk in freezer.
Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Observed handle of ice scoop in ice.
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Clean clothes, hair restraints, fingernail maint., jewelry, eating/drinking (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
